description.chinese: 一把生锈但仍然锋利的剑。
description.pinyin: Yī bǎ shēngxiù dàn réngrán fēnglì de jiàn.
description.english: A rusty but still sharp sword.

description.chinese: 一个华丽的金杯，散发着古老的魔法光芒。
description.pinyin: Yī gè huálì de jīn bēi, sànfā zhe gǔlǎo de mófǎ guāngmáng.
description.english: A magnificent golden chalice glowing with ancient magic.
